name: JoAi: Log Contact Activity

title.en: Log an activity on a contact
title.es: Log an activity on a contact
title.fr: Log an activity on a contact
title.ro: Log an activity on a contact
title.it: Log an activity on a contact

description.en: Log any type of activity on a contact — note, call, meeting, task, update, or custom event. Emails are NOT logged here; they live in dedicated email-integrated rooms.
description.de: Beliebige Aktivität bei einem Kontakt protokollieren – Notiz, Anruf, Meeting, Aufgabe, Update oder benutzerdefiniertes Ereignis. E-Mails werden hier nicht protokolliert; sie liegen in dedizierten E-Mail-integrierten Rooms.
description.es: Log any type of activity on a contact — note, call, meeting, task, update, or custom event. Emails are NOT logged here; they live in dedicated email-integrated rooms.
description.fr: Log any type of activity on a contact — note, call, meeting, task, update, or custom event. Emails are NOT logged here; they live in dedicated email-integrated rooms.
description.ro: Log any type of activity on a contact — note, call, meeting, task, update, or custom event. Emails are NOT logged here; they live in dedicated email-integrated rooms.
description.it: Log any type of activity on a contact — note, call, meeting, task, update, or custom event. Emails are NOT logged here; they live in dedicated email-integrated rooms.

bot: Use this to log any interaction or touchpoint with a contact. Prefer specific types (call, meeting) over custom when applicable. Do NOT use this for emails — emails belong in dedicated email-integrated rooms, not in the contact-activity stream.

description.en: The ID of the contact to log the activity on.
description.de: Die ID des Kontakts, bei dem die Aktivität protokolliert werden soll.
description.es: The ID of the contact to log the activity on.
description.fr: The ID of the contact to log the activity on.
description.ro: The ID of the contact to log the activity on.
description.it: The ID of the contact to log the activity on.

description.en: The type of activity: note, call, meeting, task, update, or custom.
description.de: Art der Aktivität: note, call, meeting, task, update oder custom.
description.es: The type of activity: note, call, meeting, task, update, or custom.
description.fr: The type of activity: note, call, meeting, task, update, or custom.
description.ro: The type of activity: note, call, meeting, task, update, or custom.
description.it: The type of activity: note, call, meeting, task, update, or custom.

inputs.bot: The activity type. Use 'note' for general observations, 'call' for calls, 'meeting' for meetings, 'task' for to-dos, 'update' for status changes, 'custom' for anything else. Do NOT use this for emails — emails belong in dedicated email-integrated rooms, not in the contact-activity stream.

inputs.name: Description
inputs.bot: A clear description of what happened or what was discussed.
